task_completion.description: Open the 'Log time' form for the correct work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject 'Log time' modal or page is open, showing it is associated with the 'Implement biometric login (Face ID / Fingerprint)' work package.

task_completion.description: Enter 3.5 hours into the duration field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '3.5' (or '3:30') is visible in the hours/duration input field of the Log time form.
The date field in the Log time form shows the current date (this is often the default value).
The exact text 'Completed Face ID integration for iOS, testing in progress.' is visible in the comment/notes text area of the Log time form.
The agent clicks the 'Save' or checkmark button to submit the form, or the form is seen transitioning to a loading/saving state.

task_completion.description: Verify the time entry was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (toast message) appears indicating the time was logged, OR the 3.5-hour entry with the correct comment is visible in the work package's activity feed or 'Logged time' table.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing inside the web browser running OpenProject, rather than using a terminal to send cURL/API requests.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual OpenProject application to log time.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs and saved entries appear within the OpenProject UI, not in a text editor, notepad, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open in the screenshots showing the final saved time entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct work package is 'Implement biometric login (Face ID / Fingerprint)' in the 'Mobile Banking App' project. The required logged time is 3.5 hours. The required comment is 'Completed Face ID integration for iOS, testing in progress.'. The date must be today's date. The setup script automatically navigates the browser to the work package's activity page.
